## Legacy Portfolio / Research DoD (profile-scoped; not core authority)

D1–D11 are retained for historical evidence and maturity tracking. They do not define `core_autonomous_runtime` except where an exact driving item is also assigned to that named profile.

| ID | Criterion | Status | Driven By |
|---|---|---|---|
| D1 | A new image can be processed with one CLI command to every indexed PART draft in the active production ontology; the expanded project requires gated v2 activation. | blocked | MF-P2-08.04, MF-P7-06.06 |
| D2 | Human-anchor and certificate-covered autonomous finalization flows preserve explicit truth authority and produce immutable QA-passing packages; residual/audit CVAT routing remains reversible. | blocked | MF-P1-07.05, MF-P1-08.04, MF-P1-13.07, MF-P1-13.08 |
| D3 | Auto-QA battery (34 checks) runs on every package and blocks bad gold automatically. | complete | MF-P1-07.01, MF-P1-07.02, MF-P1-07.03, MF-P2-07.03, MF-P2-07.04, MF-P3-06.08, MF-P4-09.01 |
| D4 | Local/cloud QA, autonomous repair, selective certification, residual routing, mixed auditing, and revocation pass frozen human-anchor gates. | blocked | MF-P4-EXIT, MF-P4-10.09, MF-P4-11.15 |
| D5 | ≥300 optional legacy training/scale packages exist in human_anchor_train or exact autonomous_certified_gold with the required statistical certificate, tier-separated authority, full manifests, hashes, and coverage matrix ≥80% cell coverage; operationally_certified_artifact and bridge/operational certificates are ineligible. | blocked | MF-P5-10.05, MF-P7-01.01, MF-P7-01.02 |
| D6 | Custom fine-tuned body-part model beats the SAM2+priors draft pipeline on the frozen test holdout for mean per-part IoU and boundary F-score, per the leaderboard. | blocked | MF-P5-07.02, MF-P5-10.09, MF-P5-10.11 |
| D7 | Hand/finger specialist model achieves finger-class mean IoU ≥ 0.70 on hand-crop holdout. | blocked | MF-P5-05.04 |
| D8 | ComfyUI node pack loads gold/predicted masks and produces derived inpaint masks inside a workflow. | blocked | MF-P6-03.03, MF-P6-06.08, MF-P6-EXIT |
| D9 | Full environment is reproducible from env\ lockfiles + models\model_registry.json on a clean machine. | blocked | MF-P0-02.08, MF-P0-02.09, MF-P0-06.01, MF-P0-16.12, MF-P0-17.04, MF-P0-EXIT |
| D10 | Runbook operations (backup, retrain, failure mining) each executed successfully at least once. | blocked | MF-P7-03.06, MF-P7-07.09 |

|---|---|---|---|---|
| G1 | Human labor: touches/100 images, audited/residual fractions, changed pixels/100k; review minutes secondary | zero-touch ≥0.95, routine human touch ≤0.05, manual pixel edit fraction ≤0.01 | pending | (not measured) |
| G2 | Draft quality (mean per-part IoU against image-disjoint human-anchor truth) | ≥0.85 body, ≥0.70 fingers/toes | pending | (not measured) |
| G3 | Boundary quality (boundary F-score @2px tolerance) | ≥0.80 body, ≥0.65 fingers/hair | pending | (not measured) |
| G4 | Format integrity (human-anchor and autonomous-certified packages passing all checks) | 100% (hard gate) | pending | (not measured) |
| G5 | Left/right correctness (L/R swaps in certified and human-anchor audits) | 0 (hard gate via QC-014 + review) | pending | (not measured) |
| G6 | Dataset scale (certified packages, truth tiers reported separately) | 300 certified minimum, 500 target; pseudo-labels excluded | pending | (not measured) |
| G7 | Custom model role win with every hard/high-risk bucket non-inferior | Primary win/labor reduction on frozen human-anchor holdout with no hard-bucket regression | pending | (not measured) |
| G8 | Reproducibility (rebuild env + rerun pipeline -> byte-identical maps) | Yes (seeded) | pending | (not measured) |
| G9 | Multi-person correctness (cross-instance bleed in certified/human-anchor audits, doc 17) | 0 (hard gate via QC-035/036, selective audit, and revocation) | pending | (not measured) |
